svg.text: Two trunks merge at α. Everything downstream passes through the exchange rate.

g.text: φ coheres · π closes · e grows
Bridge line: depth = α⁻¹ × R + σ²

svg.text: Way back: measure G, Λ, H₀ → fit line → intercept = σ² → σ = 1−σ² → axiom
= iteration dynamics + Galois ratio + [π and e meet here]
The 0.036 is where the two trunks interfere. Not a leftover — the joint.
